event: Abstract expressionist composition — Death and Fire
description: A small, intense abstract painting by Paul Klee depicting a simplified pale face or skull-like form at center, rendered with bold dark outlines against a background of warm red, orange, and brown tones. The face has circular eyes and an open mouth. To the right, a stick-like figure with raised arms stands near what may be a vertical element. A dark circle appears at the upper left. The composition is painted on a coarse-textured ground with thick, rough brushwork. The overall effect is primitive and haunting, created in Klee's late period when he was suffering from a fatal illness.
